sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9910" key="a)ntidomh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιδομή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δέμω</etym>) <sense id="n9910.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">opposed</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">substiluted building,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:23:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
